key_findings: Agent used `blank` template — noted the 9 templates listed in the skill don't actually exist in HyperFrames (only `blank`, `title-card`, `video-edit` are real)
Template choice was a guess — no decision guidance in the skill for template selection
Agent correctly chose shader transitions for HIGH energy mood (consulted mood/energy table in features.md)
Epoch 1's transition reference pointer worked as intended
Agent used --quality high for client deliverable — good decision
Could NOT use --docker because Docker daemon wasn't running — no fallback workflow documented
No render-config decision guidance exists in the skill

failure_patterns.pattern: The skill lists 9 templates (`warm-grain`, `play-mode`, `swiss-grid`, `vignelli`, `decision-tree`, `kinetic-type`, `product-promo`, `nyt-graph`, `blank`) but only `blank`, `title-card`, and `video-edit` actually exist in HyperFrames. 6 of 9 listed templates don't exist. This is a factual error that wastes agent time on non-existent commands.
failure_patterns.impact: Agents attempt non-existent `--example` flags or waste context on template names that can't be used.

failure_patterns.pattern: No render-config decision guidance exists in the Procedure. Agents must infer --quality/--format/--docker choices from the CLI reference table without any when-to-use guidance.
failure_patterns.impact: Inconsistent decision-making across tasks. Docker assumed available but has no fallback workflow.

failure_patterns.pattern: Template selection has no decision table. When faced with a data-viz task, the agent had to guess which template (if any) maps to data visualization.
failure_patterns.impact: Template selection is arbitrary rather than intentional.

epoch_1_edit_effectiveness.scaffold_hard_gate: 100% compliance — all agents used init (was 33% in baseline)
epoch_1_edit_effectiveness.gsap_only_gate: 100% compliance — all agents used GSAP (was 67% in baseline)
epoch_1_edit_effectiveness.transition_reference: Effective — train-05 agent consulted mood/energy table and chose correctly
epoch_1_edit_effectiveness.blog_companion_gate: Not triggered in any training task
